changeSet.author: dnd-app
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'Blessed', 'Божественное благословение', 'STAT_MODIFIER', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'STR'), 2, NULL, true, now(), now()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'Hasted', 'Ускорение', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, 10, true, now(), now()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'Poisoned', 'Отравление', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, 5, false, now(), now()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'Weakened', 'Ослабление', 'STAT_MODIFIER', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'STR'), -3, NULL, false, now(), now()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'Burning', 'Горение', 'DAMAGE_OVER_TIME', NULL, NULL, 3, false, now(), now()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'Regenerating', 'Регенерация', 'HEAL_OVER_TIME', NULL, NULL, 5, true, now(), now()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'Stunned', 'Оглушение', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, 2, false, now(), now()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'Frightened', 'Страх', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, 4, false, now(), now());
